channel.title: Digital-Twin on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Digital-Twin on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Digital Twin Frameworks: Eclipse Ditto vs FIWARE vs ThingsBoard IoT (2026)
item.description: Digital twin technology creates virtual replicas of physical assets, enabling real-time monitoring, simulation, and predictive maintenance. While cloud providers offer managed digital twin services, self-hosted open-source frameworks give you full data ownership and avoid vendor lock-in. This guide compares the leading self-hosted digital twin platforms.
